name: python3-fake-factory
title: python3-fake-factory
summary: Faker is a Python library that generates fake data (Python 3)
description:
Faker is a Python library that generates fake data (Python 3)
The fake data can be used to bootstrap a database, create XML documents, or
anonymize data taken from a production service.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fake-factory because Faker is a Python library that generates fake data (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fake-factory as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fake-factory with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fake-factory --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
